message:
feat(mux): add Window menu with tab/split navigation

- Toggle Full Screen (Cmd+Shift+F)
- Show Previous/Next Tab (Ctrl+Shift+Tab / Ctrl+Tab)
- Zoom Split (Cmd+Shift+Enter)
- Select Previous/Next Split (Cmd+[ / Cmd+])
- Select Split submenu (directional with Cmd+Shift+Arrows)
- Resize Split submenu (equalize, move dividers)
- Dynamic tab list at bottom of menu
- Added submenu CSS styling
